About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows ADTTF dominating the long-term momentum rankings with a score of 94.7 and rank #1, driven by extraordinary 10-year returns of 9024.4% and consistent acceleration across timeframes (1-month: 14.27%, 5-year: 686.72%). ADTTF demonstrates exceptional relative strength versus SPY, QQQ, and gold (IAU) across all periods, with all four moving average indicators in bullish alignment and a "strong_buy" signal despite minimal pullback pressure. In contrast, ATEX shows a more volatile profile with explosive near-term momentum (6-month: 391.77%) but concerning deterioration in longer-period ratios (5-year ratio of 0.21 suggests slowing returns relative to 1-year performance) and underperformance versus QQQ over 5 and 10 years. The stark difference suggests ADTTF represents established secular strength while ATEX may represent a concentrated recent spike, with ADTTF's clean momentum signal and high positional scores indicating more sustained uptrend structure.
